items.title: Why Trump tariff inflation is arriving slowly
items.description: Trump's tariffs have raised costs but not yet caused widespread inflation. Credit crafty importers.

items.title: Will Slowing Global Demand Dent PG's Emerging Market Strategy?
items.description: Procter & Gamble's emerging market strength in Latin America and India shows resilience despite global demand concerns.

items.title: Procter & Gamble Exhibits High P/E: A Buy Opportunity or Time to Wait?
items.description: PG posts solid growth and dividend strength, but its high valuation sparks debate on whether the stock is worth buying now.

items.title: The Advertising Research Foundation Announces 2025 ARF David Ogilvy Awards Finalists
items.description: The Advertising Research Foundation (ARF) today announced the finalists for the 2025 ARF David Ogilvy Awards, honoring successes in research-driven advertising campaigns.

items.title: Consumer Strength Signal Flashing Short-Term Caution Sign
items.description: Longer term, historical pops in XLY/XLP relative strength show up better for bulls
